title: Area Definition (0x4D)
description: Area Definition triplet layout. Length and TID are not mapped here; payload starts at offset 2.

elements.name: Reserved
elements.description: Reserved byte; should be zero. Present for alignment and future use.

elements.name: XarOset
elements.description: X-axis origin of the area (signed binary, 3 bytes, big-endian). Range 0–32767 per spec; negative values typically not used.

elements.name: YarOset
elements.description: Y-axis origin of the area (signed binary, 3 bytes, big-endian). Range 0–32767 per spec; negative values typically not used.

elements.name: XarSize
elements.description: Area extent for the X axis (unsigned binary, 3 bytes, big-endian).

elements.name: YarSize
elements.description: Area extent for the Y axis (unsigned binary, 3 bytes, big-endian).

notes: TID for this triplet is X'4D'. Length field (offset 0) and TID (offset 1) are intentionally not mapped per instructions.
